title: BEM-877 response changes
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM877_PROTOCOL_V15_RESPONSE.md: 
Agreed changes:
- Create v1.5 with clickable TOC links inside TOC table.
- Centralize definitions once and reference them later.
- Remove low-value continuity section.
- Keep architecture section focused on managing contour; put product repositories in separate section.
- Define workspaces once: development workspace, testing workspace, main workspace.
- Describe testing as assigned responsibility of one internal contour, not a permanent extra contour.
- Clarify Curator-to-Curator exchange between objects.
- Expand managing contour as factory, architect, support, repair, upgrade, and learning center.
No issue comments.
